subject: fix(types): add explicit undefined initial value to useRef calls
body:
TypeScript strict mode requires explicit initial argument for useRef
when the type parameter doesn't include undefined. Pass undefined
explicitly to satisfy tsc -b in the Vercel build pipeline.

Tags: types, fix
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 4
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: polish-hardening
Semver: patch
